  1. io.graphite.algorithm
  2. GraphAlgorithm

Uses of Class
io.graphite.algorithm.GraphAlgorithm

Packages that use GraphAlgorithm
Package
Description
io.graphite.algorithm.bipartite
Bipartite checking algorithms.
io.graphite.algorithm.connectivity
Connectivity based algorithms.
io.graphite.algorithm.cycle
Cycle detection algorithms.
io.graphite.algorithm.euler
Eulerian graph algorithms.
io.graphite.algorithm.mst
Minimum Spanning Tree algorithms.
io.graphite.algorithm.shortestpath
Shortest path algorithms.
io.graphite.algorithm.topology
Topology algorithms.
io.graphite.algorithm.traversal
Graph traversal algorithms.

  • Uses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.bipartite

    Subclasses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.bipartite
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BFSBipartiteChecker
    Determines whether a graph is bipartite using Breadth-First Search.
    class 
    DFSBipartiteChecker
    Determines whether a graph is bipartite using Depth-First Search.

  • Uses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.connectivity

    Subclasses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.connectivity
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    APFinder
    Finds all articulation points (cut vertices) in an undirected graph.
    class 
    BiconnectedComponents
    Finds all biconnected components in an undirected graph.
    class 
    BridgeFinder
    Implements Kosaraju's algorithm for finding Strongly Connected Components (SCCs) in directed graphs.
    class 
    Kosaraju
    Implements Kosaraju's algorithm for finding Strongly Connected Components (SCCs) in directed graphs.

  • Uses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.cycle

    Subclasses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.cycle
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DirectedCycleDetector
    Detects cycles in directed graphs.
    class 
    UndirectedCycleDetector
    Detects cycles in undirected graphs.

  • Uses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.euler

    Subclasses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.euler
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Hierholzer
    Implements Hierholzer's algorithm for finding Euler paths and Euler circuits.

  • Uses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.mst

    Subclasses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.mst
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Kruskal
    Implements Kruskal's Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) algorithm.
    class 
    Prim
    Implements Prim's Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) algorithm.

  • Uses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.shortestpath

    Subclasses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.shortestpath
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BellmanFord
    Implements the Bellman-Ford shortest path algorithm.
    class 
    Dijkstra
    Implements Dijkstra's shortest path algorithm.
    class 
    FloydWarshall
    Implements the Floyd-Warshall all-pairs shortest path algorithm.

  • Uses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.topology

    Subclasses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.topology
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DFSTopologicalSort
    Implements topological sorting using Depth-First Search.
    class 
    KahnTopologicalSort
    Implements Kahn's algorithm for topological sorting.

  • Uses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.traversal

    Subclasses of GraphAlgorithm in io.graphite.algorithm.traversal
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BFS
    Implements the Breadth-First Search (BFS) graph traversal algorithm.
    class 
    DFS
    Implements the Depth-First Search (DFS) graph traversal algorithm.
